channel.title: Mindfulness-based interventions for psychiatric disorders on The MetaCIH documentation
channel.description: Recent content in Mindfulness-based interventions for psychiatric disorders on The MetaCIH documentation

item.title: References of studies excluded based on full-text screening
item.description: 📄 Manuscript/Project: “Modifiers in Effects of Combined Pharmacotherapy and Psychotherapy versus Pharmacotherapy Alone for Adult Depression: An Individual Participant Data Meta-Analysis”. ⏰ Upload Date (Version): 2025-07-10, 1.0-0 🔍 Search Range: 2024-09-01 Exclusions at full-text screening from the MetaCIH Depression database Download (JSON) Exclusions at full-text screening for the meta-analysis Download (JSON)
